name: Lab Report: Chemical Reactions
description: Write a comprehensive lab report on the chemical reactions observed in Experiment 7. Include methodology, results, and analysis sections.

name: Essay: Renaissance Art Analysis
description: Analyze the influence of Renaissance art on modern artistic movements. Focus on at least three major artists.

name: Persuasive Essay: Climate Change Policy
description: Write a persuasive essay arguing for or against specific climate change policies. Must use MLA format with Works Cited page.

rubric.long_description: Clear, arguable thesis that presents a specific position on climate change policy. Thesis should be debatable, narrow enough to support, and stated prominently in introduction.
Uses at least 5 credible scholarly sources. Evidence is relevant, well-integrated, and effectively supports the thesis. Includes data, statistics, and expert opinions.
Logical progression from introduction through supporting arguments to conclusion. Clear topic sentences, smooth transitions, and cohesive paragraph structure.
Clear, precise, and engaging prose. Appropriate academic tone. Varied sentence structure. Minimal grammatical and mechanical errors.
Correct MLA in-text citations and Works Cited page. All sources properly attributed. No plagiarism.
